metadata.note: A2 archetype: the toponym/program name IS the gate. WIDE centroids (ASIA-CAUCASUS+TURKEY+IRAN+RUSSIA+USA) because sub-toponyms (Syunik, Meghri, Nakhchivan) and the branded 'Trump Route'/TRIPP name are not all in the ASIA-CAUCASUS anchor, so wider scope only helps recall. Generic 'corridor'/'transit'/'connectivity' OMITTED (would leak across every corridor story under the wide centroids) - precision comes from the specific names.
